metadata_fields.title: The ASI Stack
metadata_fields.subtitle: A Systems Architecture for Governed, Efficient, Self-Improving AI
metadata_fields.author: Corben Sorenson
metadata_fields.narrator_or_tooling_note: No narrator or synthesis tooling is approved yet; final audio artifacts must record the actual narrator or generation tool before release.
metadata_fields.rights_statement: Blocked pre-release metadata only: no audio publication or distribution approval exists until an audio edition release record explicitly grants it.

decision: The current curated-reader audio lane now has complete pre-release metadata fields for title, subtitle, author, major version, language, source commit, source tag, script digest, narrator/tooling note, and rights statement. This clears only `audio_metadata_not_reviewed` for the blocked candidate. The metadata deliberately records that no narrator, synthesis tool, audio artifact, distribution right, or audio release approval exists yet.
release_boundary: This metadata review clears only `audio_metadata_not_reviewed` because the required audio metadata fields have been specified for the current blocked candidate. It does not create MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts, does not approve a narrator or synthesis tool, does not timecode chapter markers, does not perform a pronunciation or listening spot check, does not approve audio publication rights, does not create an audio edition release record, and does not promote any claim support state.
non_claims: This manifest does not create MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts.
This manifest does not approve a narrator, voice, synthesis tool, pronunciation, or recorded listening quality.
This manifest does not timecode chapter markers.
This manifest does not approve audio publication or distribution rights.
This manifest does not approve an audiobook or audio edition release.
This manifest does not promote any chapter core claim or support state.
